cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. So there are five people on a soccer team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. At the start of the match, they each have specific positions. Let me note those down first. Initial assignments: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, as the game progresses, they swap positions in pairs. The problem states several swaps that happen in sequence. I need to track each swap step by step to determine where each person ends up, particularly Bob's final position. Let me list out the swaps in order: 1. Dave and Bob trade positions. 2. Dave and Eve trade positions. 3. Alice and Bob trade positions. 4. Dave and Claire trade positions. 5. Dave and Eve trade positions. I'll track each person's position after each swap. Let me create a table to keep track of their positions step by step. Starting positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper After first swap (Dave and Bob): - Alice: right winger (unchanged) - Bob: cheerleader (since Dave was there) - Claire: left winger (unchanged) - Dave: right midfielder (since Bob was there) - Eve: goalkeeper (unchanged) So now, Bob is in the cheerleader position, and Dave is in the right midfielder. Second swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader (no change here because this swap is between Dave and Eve) - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper (since Eve was there) - Eve: right midfielder (since Dave was there - remember after first swap, Dave was at right midfielder so Eve takes that position) So after second swap, Dave is goalkeeper, Eve is right midfielder. Third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice: cheerleader (since Bob was in cheerleader position) - Bob: right winger (since Alice was in right winger) - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap (Dave and Claire): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper (since Dave was there) - Dave: left winger (since Claire was there) - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: right midfielder (since Eve was there) - Eve: left winger (since Dave was there) Wait, let me check that again for the last swap. After the fourth swap, Dave is in left winger and Eve is in right midfielder. So fifth swap is Dave and Eve trading positions: - Dave moves to Eve's position (right midfielder) - Eve moves to Dave's position (left winger) So at the end of the match, Bob's position is right winger. Let me check again step by step to be sure. Initial positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper First swap (Dave and Bob): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap (Dave and Claire): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: left winger Yes, so at the end of the match, Bob is playing right winger.
